textByHashes.bab3a31b83b924376dcf47c44da8c084976baf10: Be they heroic, brave and true?
textByHashes.52db7fa65e4619513c20d862ce224a3a8c66b9a4: Brilliant! The island's location will remain a secret!
textByHashes.b43ba447b0d400d873484866e2865d12c81e8c4b: We may make it through this yet...
textByHashes.d4ad1ac0fbf64621daac59b5fe84415697ba1665: Arr... Those devils gave ye a nasty knock when ye came to aid us.
textByHashes.8ac67d282f6e980020d8959ed47f84c06d3c633d: But now yer here we'll run those evil brain-eatin' dogs off the island fer good!
textByHashes.20d50ded4b58953ce1abd3474aad63a231037345: Arr. Well, lad, that would be Pete, one of my men.
textByHashes.7a5dfe01a1aedeef19e773f0070c3ca69697440e: Arr. Well, lass, that would be Pete, one of my men.
textByHashes.cc01d936a019b50d19c17c946282183b0f801c14: He's been out lookin' fer heroes like yerself to aid us in our peril.
textByHashes.56bf1cc9412efcaa45d1f52bbb6ad5cb793cc7f0: Where it lies is a secret, because ye are standin' in the brewery of Cap'n Braindeath, purveyor of the most vitriolic alcoholic beverages in the world!
textByHashes.cfcf98deecdd9fe2a1878710ce75b091cebc8381: I am the notorious alchemist Cap'n Braindeath, and this whole operation be my idea!
textByHashes.753d1c00a5e30a1a6ac35da227454dc6c1a1647c: With my crew of sturdy, upright pirate brewers, we sail the seven seas, distributing cheap 'alcohol' to all and sundry.
textByHashes.7d962f10d881d69250bd08292ac3691c30e6506f: These be dark times, though, lad. See, a week ago we awoke to find ourselves beseiged.
textByHashes.9d4a64187fbbad582f63259cd8bb1f2d5ed42f0c: These be dark times, though, lass. See, a week ago we awoke to find ourselves beseiged.
textByHashes.5460d4ace0f6efae9b8d01bc1377fff894d3f8c7: The lads and I have held them off so far, but 'tis only a matter of time before they sweep through the buildin' and put us all to the sword.
textByHashes.ab89746587abaf7ccfaa16f16c7cc136b7c5f3fb: Day and night they seek to break our will with their chantin', and their singin' and their passive resistance!
textByHashes.c40113fcbed10bb37f574e7b69be34dae46a65ee: Well, me and the lads got our heads together and decided that if we can get their Cap'n drunk enough, perhaps they'll stop protestin'.
textByHashes.4dee38731e72e4a64e1a5cf8859fbac4220827ac: If that happens, we'll slip out the back and set up shop somewhere else.
textByHashes.221efb26f6b42367fd4a1d7900c73bbc28623444: Well, first of all, we need someone to go out the front and grow us some Blindweed.
textByHashes.d00e282298f6389ead55a636912e210eb5113680: 'Tis one of the ingredients of our 'rum'.
textByHashes.e890aedac21bde6869a5bf1f0b0d4c4d010ec503: The only problem is that those rottin' fiends have torn up and destroyed all but one of the Blindweed Patches.
textByHashes.12facea58b0459cf7196c7c96841a44297093263: Here, lad. I'll give ye the seed you'll need fer growin' the herb. Help yerself to the gardenin' equipment in the basement.
textByHashes.465c1c1e202af8e351e474b7cbc5e5fbfc858fb3: Here, lass. I'll give ye the seed you'll need fer growin' the herb. Help yerself to the gardenin' equipment in the basement.
textByHashes.ac21ff03d77b8d17e523fcb8e0b22063360cf0f9: I'll warn ye again that those devils are sat right on top of the patch.
textByHashes.51251d5b0aefa4175ba42aaa35ed8d7f06179bb7: Try hecklin' 'em from a distance. Those Swabs may talk a good fight, but if ye can put a scare in 'em they'll keep out of yer way!
textByHashes.b5709be27e4ea898d9770096feefdc07fd124c8b: Arr, well I want ye to get outside and grow some Blindweed.
textByHashes.0f93dca4f0f95154e6a4f01844d6178b60509882: Best be careful, lad, fer them pirates will skin ye alive if they catch ye.
textByHashes.75f82aefda67e5980e704558011f0d65fa1ddc30: Best be careful, lass, fer them pirates will skin ye alive if they catch ye.
textByHashes.ac60e681d70cd8be8fd4ea71765b3bc7d678e788: Then I'll have ye flogged, hung, slapped with a haddock and sent back out there to fight the zombie hordes with little more than harsh language!
textByHashes.47944683b3ba80518a8f94290f07842c175cad6d: Come back and see me when ye ain't loaded down with stuff, and I'll give ye another.
textByHashes.46a325183ad36f5b05252ce1aa19afcdad88bec9: Arr... Here, lad. Just take this and get goin'!
textByHashes.fc8fd4a870fe9a6f07b7da538d5b43e35670a07c: Arr... Here, lass. Just take this and get goin'!
textByHashes.11568c262c54e631bbb5fe87e4fcac32f301da51: However, 'tis also true that I stumbled across the basic recipe fer my most potent of brews in a terrible alchemical accident.
textByHashes.840243a9a67203331f955ff941c74ddb3444f52e: See, 'twas a dark and stormy night, and the wind was howlin' around the trees as I worked late into the night.
textByHashes.868ab7d2499cba0fdf47d9e394cbbf55a19de8a4: Steppin' too close to a candle with my flask in my hand, I was suddenly swept up in a terrible, yet potently alcoholic, explosion.
textByHashes.cb6d152152b4616668d7363b9fd843dcacd7424f: Well' lad, it seems the fumes from that first batch of me 'rum' did strange things to me brain.
textByHashes.2887c08518f42729d05b39b44774dc4ce543ea5e: Well' lass, it seems the fumes from that first batch of me 'rum' did strange things to me brain.
textByHashes.27aef76ebe0f4539926280e87688e7aa38f1b993: I don't remember the exact words the healers used, but apparently the stuff burned out the tiny, specialised part of me brain that tells me not to talk like a pirate.
textByHashes.801c4f8ffe48a79716e331462b115e05b449315b: Arr! That be what I told them!
textByHashes.68b83199e52466497814b4201e845f9e038fa947: The finest, most potent, most flammable and most debilitatin' 'rum' in the whole of Gielinor!
textByHashes.51268a0ccb4e787d62af70b259c647ef20edc1d2: If we called the stuff we make 'rum' without makin' the little quote gestures every time, then the Cookin' Guild has promised to do entertaininly painful things to us with whisks.
textByHashes.9f619bb87a5e4609a4963e80ef75aa9b4ce6744c: And by that I mean technically according to the Disposal of Hazardous Waste Act and the Health and Safety Laws -
textByHashes.f5f526f63d365c097b3c41863f000a9b561c1c85: technically, what we're brewin' here is Artificially Produced Hyper Condensed Sweetened 'Rum' Flavour Distillate.
textByHashes.41cfef0dd4545a00b884d4b1c6f145d6a9b499d0: So ye see, lad, we just call it 'rum' because the real name be a bit of a mouthful.
textByHashes.70f74ca6062a9a0b9504c0ced693ecbab73d301f: So ye see, lass, we just call it 'rum' because the real name be a bit of a mouthful.
textByHashes.ede9b459f52fa38c26f504b127121976bdd6a805: Arr, well, I want ye to get outside and grow some Blindweed.
textByHashes.e500019a21385ead65777124822747aecedd4abd: Splendid, lad! Go shove it in the Intake Hopper upstairs.
textByHashes.24e7d6a919946705835e95411dcf19bf7243c6af: Splendid, lass! Go shove it in the Intake Hopper upstairs.
textByHashes.79725c0a88f922d35a35c129be408113c7b93b7e: We'll beat them zombies yet! Arr!
textByHashes.531306aa25e71c003f3a861a8f46185c8965e6f4: Here, I've been savin' some fer an emergency.
textByHashes.770edcf7f2da5652761b69769770d74704c5a9fa: Go shove that in the Intake Hopper, and try not ter lose this lot!
textByHashes.45c5470a99c0af045f3dc9b021745296f68b0c47: I want ye to go put yer Blindweed in the intake hopper, and to be sharp about it!
textByHashes.5cad733f492a765305592a4709ff308b35acc6c8: Yer nothin' better than a sea-slug wearin', lilly-legged, bandy-livered landlubber!
textByHashes.6c51879079882611ce4447424d231a9b3535558c: I've got a little put aside fer an emergency. Drop some of that junk yer carryin', and come see me to get it.
textByHashes.d5db8c90e6b4d4e7be8200be8f7147883e70dd94: Here, I was savin' a little fer an emergency, so take this and shove it in the hopper before I bung ye in there and turn the handle!
textByHashes.9c6d1c4da85195b44f6906bd476eaef4d2907711: Less talk, lad, haven't ye got a hopper to be fillin'?
textByHashes.1939744e583e559e1b051a277e1541de78740884: Less talk, lass, haven't ye got a hopper to be fillin'?
textByHashes.056758e8c50d5dde9a2618f2789930c3a9b16743: Well, now ye've shoved the Blindweed into the mix, what we need is a bucket of stagnant water.
textByHashes.0202bb0e7f4688eb0cd8a4966776af15358cb102: Ye won't have to go far, lad, we have a pool of the stuff here!
textByHashes.e1ac87bfdcac2374f2f1b4f3f6d123608e471773: Ye won't have to go far, lass, we have a pool of the stuff here!
textByHashes.2729a911a1520b4f66f06fc0442aa0df9c85e6e0: No, lad, that would be a strange thing to have in a brewery!
textByHashes.de8f6bff69a4e0fe8023b3dc7b1c856477eba426: No, lass, that would be a strange thing to have in a brewery!
textByHashes.517a26e156c2c091ac4a3499395bab55f37a7fc2: It's up the mountain to the north.
textByHashes.169901bad5c4c5a6169b7ffb17cd75162588d9b1: Well, 'tis technically a volcano, but ye get the general idea.
textByHashes.8587dd3eb98bec59a2c3427bbcc1a6a51722cac8: No lad, there be not a zombie in sight.
textByHashes.61d4d4f04bd005775efc7f4acd3ebff205505f07: No lass, there be not a zombie in sight.
textByHashes.a0b6063b01264535dfcb625a814f383ddf426a36: All ye have to do is get past the keen-eyed lookout that's been spottin' my men when I send 'em.
textByHashes.8004487c1668c5ae8155d84747fa38dcddd708aa: I'll tell ye that it won't be easy!
textByHashes.934628d4af728f7d2d58b0fda6bc972b24669baf: To get off yer lazy behind and head out to the stagnant lake on top of the volcano.
textByHashes.cbdf41c31624ecd53890ea9fc1082e7c2308f7f7: I want ye to go pour yer bucket into yonder hopper.
textByHashes.13955cb60f6264b22960c951fc32c435d9837faa: Take yer time, lad, we're only bein' besieged by zombies.
textByHashes.52183908c3008a3424bd5a77a243ef80426c4bbb: Well, 'tis a good job I saved a little, isn't it? Now get rid of something so I can give it to ye.
textByHashes.7d1e24862c51f38de95e0c6506d8a82a6b54ed86: If ye weren't so good at distractin' the zombies I'd skin ye alive!
textByHashes.58a7b2f9389d37e995f5c5e89ceed6ab3a4f9c92: Take this bucket and pour it into the hopper. If ye don't get it right this time I'll have yer guts fer garters!
textByHashes.18f4027f61edd6f711df42d706f4a8ae89ced8b1: No, lad, next ye'll need to go outside and catch five loads of Sluglings fer the brew.
textByHashes.416dfef4cd46a292f76538c0ed83d55e8fd4b847: No, lass, next ye'll need to go outside and catch five loads of Sluglings fer the brew.
textByHashes.4610ad841af76b28499afa5438993c56dfca4599: 'Cos, lad they're one of our super-secret ingredients! Yer not too susceptible to mind control are ye lad?
textByHashes.83e15599fcb585528f38604a3fd229afc6117206: 'Cos, lass they're one of our super-secret ingredients! Yer not too susceptible to mind control are ye lad?
textByHashes.4b3f2507fcd70917e45eb32b8a909410f3345a2b: 'Cos, lad they're one of our super-secret ingredients! Yer not too susceptible to mind control are ye lass?
textByHashes.82af81a8b8e47afd80a71266bf49eb11366f01a2: 'Cos, lass they're one of our super-secret ingredients! Yer not too susceptible to mind control are ye lass?
textByHashes.616659d1a35cc360a7b0abe6bacc86d1afbba748: Because they have been known te, well, influence people every now and again.
textByHashes.797595d04ac70089b2fe7b1ac6a5ef23807a4d65: I'm sure ye've got nothing te worry about!
textByHashes.131af983b3b40b4a1ac53bfb6c33b4e3c1bc638d: No lad, we just call them 'Sluglings' 'cos of a long and convoluted story involvin' a metal pipe and three dead seagulls.
textByHashes.3834d6b6998afeb74d23bec3b15055c6aa1a8c3e: No lass, we just call them 'Sluglings' 'cos of a long and convoluted story involvin' a metal pipe and three dead seagulls.
textByHashes.30cb9ca52f837dd8d1e35641ebb39f2355670d67: Aye they're related! Tis a good job they'll starve if they tried te eat yer brains!
textByHashes.297090de814f3f119729f7d04af92deeadf1992a: Well, Ye shove them in the Pressure Barrel in the attic.
textByHashes.5e55dc792963fbc8aa58e49d335a529f269c93d1: Look, we don't have all day, get movin'.
textByHashes.c8b90afe42f71499b3197c3c0e6c62caff5b4f3e: Ye'll be needin' a fishbowl in a big net to help ye catch them slimy little blighters.
textByHashes.a855d20ba1a53fbb2d2b75fa0dd5b19e025a6e55: Pity ye ain't got any free space to carry one.
textByHashes.3ec28e1d9f21f38f0bb1d4f7fad334c20c76efc8: Here. Ye'll need this to catch them.
textByHashes.c527fa1a2cff17f3828b38da1b4c2f94acfb2c9c: Just dunk it in the water. I'm sure a clever lad like yerself will have no problem.
textByHashes.916c0a04863a3ab39d3887763941a8bec5d0d24f: Just dunk it in the water. I'm sure a clever lass like yerself will have no problem.
textByHashes.7a0e597a8d815a4dbb6718b96f311dd4f9500db0: Oh, and if ye haul up some squiddy-looking things, don't hesitate to shove 'em in the barrel too.
textByHashes.6b481642a1ec3c101567c3b8a5ab8522c05ecd2d: They add a special, fishy texture to the drink.
textByHashes.5ebe594955557db9728d3ba0b9c16a3fe66a7e83: I want ye to go outside and catch five sea creatures from the squid fishin' spot.
textByHashes.8b22fe4437d2bace58074e7869310facb3a7f28e: When ye've grabbed them, jam 'em in the barrel in the attic and pressurise 'em.
textByHashes.ce74e9bdc945b69b031d5de2e4bbc84612485f0c: Ye'll be needin' to use a fishbowl in a big net to snare these little devils.
textByHashes.94790070c2fc77f4c5934e50ea759ed1eadf8361: Come see me when yer not so laden down. I've got another one fer ye if ye need it.
textByHashes.dbede9bd268b5e9e9cf3d3635bac31be684f0166: Here! Try not ter lose this one! These things don't grow on trees, ye know.
textByHashes.74a0d885d6b77ea40b7509b7cbc0cdfc5ebcbe99: Gah! Get that slimy thing away from me!
textByHashes.f98de706f00ddbd9401b3de153c9cf6a3cc9c81c: What happened is ye were messin' about with Sluglings!
textByHashes.5bf07dc7f57c660116d784cc10415b48b668665b: Don't ye have anything better to do?
textByHashes.5249532ed7de8ae23272f43df3ecddf233a78594: Snap out of it, lad! Yer in slug-shock!
textByHashes.0350a8457ad93a49cd5aa9a17e4a6c56b5d808e6: Snap out of it, lass! Yer in slug-shock!
textByHashes.e52696ff3e00ffcc473d5326f10e7d62ec736157: No problem. Well, now ye have just one more ingredient to grab, and then we can get this 'rum' flowin!
textByHashes.551d8238840fc09d181b57286ccc99e22b7051e6: Not far at all, lad. Ye've just got to get it from the basement!
textByHashes.faa6ec6fd456ce02f35e6896e697ab83ff8049a9: Not far at all, lass. Ye've just got to get it from the basement!
textByHashes.619135c1befd5f0d84e46b3466796f2ba4c7125a: Hold yer horses, lad! While ye was off gallivantin' with yer slimy aquatic playmates, the 'rum' achieved spiritual critical mass.
textByHashes.0245cb2bb57777a760f8888e16a1ae0aa32e1c11: Hold yer horses, lass! While ye was off gallivantin' with yer slimy aquatic playmates, the 'rum' achieved spiritual critical mass.
textByHashes.5f2c7dd99c8b4db9b7689e5e0fdf3505341e6be9: To put it in terms ye'll understand: the brewin' equipment is possessed.
textByHashes.a0d28dd79ba5c4144274a35e6b3a153764286211: Don't ye worry yerself about it! This happens all the time.
textByHashes.094ac6095174f6f2604c6e6349c7944158a612ef: Well, to tell the truth, my lads are a little quicker off the mark, so it only happens occasionally.
textByHashes.bfbf713b80407dea09b0483acc782682fcbc0a44: Not that I'm criticisin' yer performance, lad.
textByHashes.942318e6eb31fdebef2342c1cec3767da3f01a8e: Not that I'm criticisin' yer performance, lass.
textByHashes.702e9e080125bdbe108935b277110d2647c8b346: Give the controls a couple of belts with this wrench.
textByHashes.f100fc0b4b4ed85edc3260037e33ab048419c93a: One of the lads did a little priestin' on the side before he came here. Get him to bless it and ye'll do fine.
textByHashes.d38557b745da64b9f1689d36a712a678defe9d12: I want yeto go clear the Evil Spirit out of the brewin' controls. Use the wrench I gave ye, but get it blessed first.
textByHashes.3933a068e51fc43b72ca31d14914c6590adbc9d2: Look, I've got another wrench, but ye don't have any free space fer it. Come back when ye do.
textByHashes.2bec9d96b72093f0dc30a0c283b7c64671d914ae: Arr! I'd get more work out of a minty flavoured brick!
textByHashes.ec45ef4eceb28291d7d1d60bb063e7101cf7d023: If ye lose this one I'll have ye turned inside out, covered with spiders and turned rightside in so they'll eat ye alive!
textByHashes.22354f8ada5158fc1a66a146de351abbe1d076c2: I want ye to go clear the Evil Spirit out of the brewin' controls. Use the wrench I gave ye, but get it blessed first.
textByHashes.636e724c1f913ee43d35eada6cdea1e844a2cac9: I see ye've got the wrench good and blessed, so go whack the controls till the Evil Spirit pops out.
textByHashes.99af4c4468f8d0c48f68aba45ddaca18f6d57abe: I see ye've got the wrench good and blessed, so go whack the hopper 'til the Evil Spirit pops out.
textByHashes.d5ef13a359c52d00b603875472d7c19901e7d36a: Well, now that ye've got that spirit out of there ye can dump in the final ingredient.
textByHashes.db5b83fd57e894a91bebef9a4750366a493d5cee: We need the body of a diseased Fever Spider!
textByHashes.6e756379301b141a03d7a0964e474bd88ef7d863: When yer quite done flappin' yer lips, go down into the basement and whack spiders until ye find a fever spider body.
textByHashes.0d16edcb71ff5c5e375e2d481518157f3e34ff68: Shove it in the hopper, and then we're in business.
textByHashes.4666bf578ef49dd21810b526a37eb1c45acabdc2: Ye may want to hop back to the mainland and see a Slayer Master.
textByHashes.1fe554625ec7df41804e1a20b38916f8756eabb8: These Fever Spiders carry a nasty disease, and ye'll need a pair of Slayer Gloves on to not catch it!
textByHashes.dbb94fb2e35e9ecd9fe18071a8d9383b46012f28: I see yer already wearin' some Slayer Gloves. That'll keep the Fever Spiders from gnawin' yer hands off!
textByHashes.ee0b6f62cf2d2d677351167e1bdd7cd07834987d: I want ye to go kill a Fever Spider and jam its body in the hopper.
textByHashes.dbf34e99cd8cb70c95dbb10356a3043a5e084ed4: What are ye doin', lad? I want ye to shove that in the hopper, not in me face!
textByHashes.8f0666d6bb4c7dfcf8a9fbf06f07dfcf1b31a10b: What are ye doin', lass? I want ye to shove that in the hopper, not in me face!
textByHashes.77e08e39e5013614eceabf4e6b6f64abb344418d: Ye just can't get good help these days...
textByHashes.02aac074578743820e82a1227aaa028e2f1dd211: Now ye stand well back and watch the glory of brewin' at its best!
textByHashes.ff9c847afbba4197a7b9b6c7e9b727eb70372fcf: Aye lad! Now get outside and feed that stuff to the pirates.
textByHashes.8e62b1a574db3cfa39412e899979d51fc89f5f10: Aye lass! Now get outside and feed that stuff to the pirates.
textByHashes.b5e3e1868e483bf9a2c43cc063df9980b2af2f26: Try givin' it to the Captain, he's in charge. Get him bladdered and the rest will fall!
textByHashes.7956bad245f63a9fe8a73f95113b207bacd5295c: Ye'll need to use that bucket of yours. Most stuff can't stand bein' in contact with our 'rum' fer too long.
textByHashes.5a99ddb9d7b609b0670aa03d7bedf3b577ac9ebd: Took us a lot of dissolvin' to work that one out.
textByHashes.d5d8f8b5777a2655a4c00ccf2a7ea66a03d156a4: Almost as if I aren't changing subjects, well done!
textByHashes.1d129ebd4a9dd027ee7521299f0ff0ed9ac9fe99: With those rottin' dogs legless they'll never keep fighting us now, so we've decided to stay here and keep the 'rum' flowin!
textByHashes.9d8668c71ad177b781031aa4f70ea9b155b2ef19: Thanks, lad. We'd never have managed without ye!
textByHashes.95df5d6f2aaea823186974759d3d17996f379f34: Thanks, lass. We'd never have managed without ye!
textByHashes.71306d4e73f6c71a7e5699e04a3462083633229b: Fancy some 'rum', lad? It's still fresh. Well, fresh-ish...
textByHashes.9ade088c971102d8a07dead8bff138793925cec8: Fancy some 'rum', lass? It's still fresh. Well, fresh-ish...
textByHashes.e65d282a3b4f9bb883ea91e7942dbeee243cb104: Fancy some 'rum', kid? It's still fresh. Well, fresh-ish...
